name: sd_d1_nl_lead_del
drl:
rule "RJ"
no-loop
when
    not LK2(f1 != true)
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "RD"
no-loop
salience -5
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
_finding: ORACLE-RUNAWAY 3/3 (fire limit): no-loop x leading-not x k=1 self-justifier + deleter — the NEW positive-pattern runaway family (population 7/7). Engine terminates (strictly better). Uncertifiable-by-nature; routes to xfail at graduation.
